gpu.topology:
[4mGPU0	CPU Affinity	NUMA Affinity	GPU NUMA ID[0m
GPU0	 X 	0-23	0		N/A

Legend:

  X    = Self
  SYS  = Connection traversing PCIe as well as the SMP interconnect between NUMA nodes (e.g., QPI/UPI)
  NODE = Connection traversing PCIe as well as the interconnect between PCIe Host Bridges within a NUMA node
  PHB  = Connection traversing PCIe as well as a PCIe Host Bridge (typically the CPU)
  PXB  = Connection traversing multiple PCIe bridges (without traversing the PCIe Host Bridge)
  PIX  = Connection traversing at most a single PCIe bridge
  NV#  = Connection traversing a bonded set of # NVLinks

eval_env:
# =============================================================================
# dev_rtx3090_qwen1.5b_hybrid_wave.env
#
# 머신: i9-12900KF (8 P-core + 8 E-core = 16 physical, 24 logical, 1 NUMA)
#       RTX 3090 24 GB, DDR5, L3 30 MB (single)
#       AVX2 + AVX-VNNI (AVX-512 없음, AMX 없음)
#
# 이 env 는 dev 머신 특성에 맞춰 설정됨:
#   - AVX-512/AMX 없음 → 모든 matmul 이 AVX2 경로
#   - L3 30 MB 단일 → 7B weight (14 GB) 는 절대 안 맞음, 1.5B (3 GB) 도 부분만
#   - 1 NUMA → num_cpu_engines=1 고정
#   - E-core 포함 여부는 실측 비교 필요 (아래 주석 참고)
# =============================================================================

MODEL=Qwen/Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct
PORT=8000

GPU_MEMORY_UTIL=0.85
TENSOR_PARALLEL_SIZE=1
TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE=1
HF_DATASETS_OFFLINE=1
# max_model_len 은 실제 bench shape (128/128) 대비 약간 여유만. KV cache
# 할당 최소화 → L3 여유 확보.
EXTRA_SERVE_ARGS="--max-model-len 512"

NUM_PROMPTS=500
INPUT_LEN=128
OUTPUT_LEN=128
REQUEST_RATE=inf

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# CPU engine — 단일 NUMA 1 engine
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
HYBRID_NUM_CPU_ENGINES=1
HYBRID_NUMA_AWARE=true

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Thread 수 — cpu_profile_dev.sh Section 6 실측 기반 (2026-04-14)
#
# 실측 tps (Qwen2.5-1.5B CPU decode, 64 tokens, 3-run avg):
#   threads= 4: 10.56 tps
#   threads= 8: 10.64 tps (+0.7%)
#   threads=12: 11.35 tps (+7.5%)
#   threads=16: 11.62 tps (+10.0%)  ⭐ peak (8P+8E 전부)
#   threads=24: 11.20 tps (−3.6%)   SMT 오버서브 하락
#
# E-core 가 P-core 를 못 따라가 barrier stall 의 우려는 있었으나, 실측
# 에서는 16 까지 monotonic 증가. dev i9-12900KF 의 physical core 16개
# 전부 사용이 최적.
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
HYBRID_CPU_THREADS=16
HYBRID_CPU_MAX_SEQS=4           # solo decode (IPEX batch>1 penalty 회피)
HYBRID_CPU_CORE_RATIO=1.0
HYBRID_CPU_KVCACHE_GB=0

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Routing
#
# cpu-first 는 현재 workload (500 req × 128/128, GPU saturated 아님) 에서
# CPU 에 불필요한 부하. 하지만 CPU 경로 실측 목적으로 cpu-first 유지.
# gpu_only 대비 hybrid 효과 비교가 아닌 "CPU path 작동 확인" 이 이 env 의 목적.
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
HYBRID_ROUTING_STRATEGY=wave-batch
HYBRID_ROUTING_PRIORITY=cpu-first
HYBRID_CPU_PREFILL_THRESHOLD=1024
HYBRID_WARMUP_REQUESTS=0
HYBRID_STATS_LOG_INTERVAL=50

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Intel OpenMP 튜닝 (dev 환경에서 효과 있는 것들)
#
# 현재 init_cpu_threads_env (C++) 가 sched_setaffinity 로 pin 하므로
# KMP_AFFINITY 는 중복이지만 KMP_BLOCKTIME=0 은 의미 있음.
# spin-wait 대신 즉시 sleep → burst 간 간섭 감소.
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
export KMP_BLOCKTIME=0
export OMP_PROC_BIND=close
export OMP_PLACES=cores

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Diagnostic
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VLLM_HYBRID_TRACE=0
VLLM_HYBRID_TRACE_EVERY=0
# 처음엔 PROFILE 켜서 병목 확인. 실측 run 에선 0 으로 끄기 (hook overhead 제거)
VLLM_HYBRID_PROFILE=0
VLLM_HYBRID_PROFILE_EVERY=0

MONITOR_INTERVAL=1
RESULTS_DIR=results
SERVER_READY_TIMEOUT=300
SERVER_READY_POLL=5
